1.content: My name is Peter Parker, and I am the one and only Spider-Man. I've kept my identity a secret for years, but there's another secret that is even bigger. I've never told anyone, not MJ, Harry, Gwen, Mr. Stark, or Aunt May...certainly not Aunt May. I can't imagine what she would think. She already freaked out when she found out I was Spider-Man. Truth is, I have a huge foot fetish. I've had it for years, and I can't wait any longer. I need to act on my fetish for once. I'm 17, I think I'm old enough to finally indulge in it. I know plenty of girls whose feet I've fantasized about for years; MJ, Gwen, Black Widow, Scarlet Witch...oooh Scarlet Witch...snap out of it Peter. It's time. Let's go. Where do I start?
1.title: Peter's Story Begins

info.brief_description: Spider-Man indulges in his foot fetish with fellow friends and Avengers
info.description: This story follows you, Spider-Man, indulging in his foot fetish. Any FEMALE character in Marvel is available for use. If you add, please do not add guy feet. Don't be afraid to add on!
